def negative_batchable_writes_executed_one_at_a_time():
    rule_id = "batchable_writes_executed_one_at_a_time"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated write operations that could be grouped or buffered."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
